category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes ndenv as a Node.js version manager based on rbenv.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is ndenv.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository, whose README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/riywo/ndenv, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes ndenv as based on rbenv.
